params.tokenId: The Warplet token ID to auction

bid(uint256).notice: Place a bid on the current Warplet auction

settle().notice: Settle the current auction only while the contract is paused (emergency / migration path).         Does not start the next auction — use `settleCurrentAndCreateNewAuction` when unpaused.

settleCurrentAndCreateNewAuction().notice: Settle the current auction and start the next from the queue (normal user path)

startAuction(uint256).notice: Start a new auction with a gobbled Warplet
